---
title: "fase_3_ditetiske_afvigelser"
subtitle: "`fase_3_ditetiske_afvigelser`"
description: "fase_3_ditetiske_afvigelser"
---

<!--
NEVER EDIT MANUALLY. This documentation was auto-generated by `seedcase-flower`.
If you want to edit the content, please make changes to the `datapackage.json` file.
-->

- Path: `resources/fase_3_ditetiske_afvigelser/data.parquet`
- Primary key: (`event`)

| Name                                    | Title                                 | Type   | Description                                                                                                                   |
|-----------------------------------------|---------------------------------------|--------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `event`                                 | The unique name of the event          | string | The unique name identifying the event when the form was filled in.                                                            |
| `center`                                | Research center                       | string | The research center where the data item was recorded.                                                                         |
| `date_registration_dietary_deviation_3` | date_registration_dietary_deviation_3 | date   | Date for when the deviation is registered during phase 3. Dietary deviations. Repeated instrument.                            |
| `staff_initials_dietary_deviation_3`    | staff_initials_dietary_deviation_3    | string | Initials of the study staff member responsible for registration of the dietary deviation during phase 3. Repeated instrument. |
| `date_dietary_deviation_3`              | date_dietary_deviation_3              | date   | Start date for possible planed deviation from VLCD dietary recommendations. Phase 3. Repeated instrument.                     |
| `date_end_dietary_deviation_3`          | date_end_dietary_deviation_3          | date   | End date for possible planed deviation from VLCD dietary recommendations. Phase 3. Repeated instrument.                       |
| `reason_dietary_deviation_3`            | reason_dietary_deviation_3            | string | Reason for deviation. Phase 3. Repeated instrument.                                                                           |
| `reasonother_dietary_deviation_3`       | reasonother_dietary_deviation_3       | string | Dietary deviations if "other" was chosen. Phase 3. Repeated instrument.                                                       |
| `upload_dietary_deviation_3`            | upload_dietary_deviation_3            | string | Document with plan for planned deviation during phase 3. Repeated instrument.                                                 |
| `comment_dietary_deviation_3`           | comment_dietary_deviation_3           | string | Comment to dietary deviations. Phase 3. Repeated instrument.                                                                  |

: Fields in the `fase_3_ditetiske_afvigelser` resource.
